title: NativeLibMapDatabase
description: Schema for the native .so library → npm package mapping file (native-lib-map.json).

version.description: Calendar-based version label for this mapping set, e.g. '2025-Q2'.

updated_at.description: ISO date when this file was last updated.

description.description: Human-readable description of the mapping file's purpose.

mappings.description: List of native library → npm package mappings.

npm_packages.description: npm package name(s) that ship these native libraries.

min_version.description: Minimum npm package version that ships 16 KB page-aligned binaries.

reason.description: Explanation of why this version is the minimum compliant version.

docs_url.description: Link to the release note or documentation confirming compliance.

confidence.description: How certain we are about this minimum version.
